overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing the player character entering and exploring the 'Empathy' nightclub. The scene features vibrant blue and red neon lighting, futuristic cyberpunk architecture, and crowds of NPCs. The character walks from the exterior entrance through reception and corridors into the main dance floor, visits a private booth for dialogue, then returns to watch the central stage performance.

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the entrance of the Empathy nightclub at night. The entrance features a red carpet flanked by two large neon statues and blue cylindrical pillars. Pink and red neon signs illuminate the facade as the character walks toward the bouncers standing at the doors.

slows down approaching the reception desk

agents.ego_description: walking through the entrance past the bouncers toward the reception desk

entered.detail: large red neon sign spelling 'empathy' above the reception desk
curved white reception counter with blue accent lighting
red velvet ropes on stanchions guiding the entrance queue

segments.scene_description: The character enters the lobby passing the bouncers. The interior features a prominent red neon 'empathy' sign above a sleek white reception desk. Blue cylindrical pillars continue from the exterior, and velvet ropes line the path. The lighting shifts to a darker, more enclosed atmosphere.

passes the weapons check window and turns toward the main club

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a narrow, dimly lit corridor with hexagonal floor tiles. Red neon signs mark the weapons check area. The environment is darker and more enclosed than the reception area, with digital posters on the walls.

turns left toward the private booth area

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into the expansive main nightclub area featuring a large circular central stage with dancers and dramatic blue and red neon lighting. The space is filled with scattered patrons, a long bar to the right, and beaded curtains marking private booth areas to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: private VIP booth with seating and bottle service

dialogue interaction begins with seated NPCs in the booth

agents.ego_description: entering the private booth and engaging in conversation with the occupants

segments.scene_description: The character passes through the beaded curtains into an intimate private booth. The space features U-shaped seating with red upholstery, a central table with bottles, and a distinctive white neon Y-shaped light on the back wall. The character engages in dialogue with the seated patrons.

scene_state.functional_zone: main dance floor viewing area near the bar

events.description: exits the private booth back into the main club area
stops near the bar to watch the stage performance

agents.ego_description: walking along the bar and stopping to watch the dancers on the central stage

segments.scene_description: The character exits the private booth and walks along the bar area, returning to the main dance floor. The camera focuses on the central stage where dancers perform inside a cylindrical glass structure surrounded by blue and red neon lights. The character stops to observe the performance while other patrons mingle around the bar.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the vibrant exterior of the Empathy nightclub into its immersive, neon-drenched interior. It begins with an approach toward the entrance, moving past red carpets and towering neon statues under a glow of pink and red signs. As the character passes the bouncers, the scene shifts into a darker, more enclosed lobby with a sleek white reception desk before narrowing further into a dimly lit corridor marked by hexagonal tiles and digital posters. The environment then opens abruptly into an expansive main hall featuring a circular central stage and dramatic blue and red lighting, which the camera navigates toward an intimate private booth hidden behind beaded curtains. Finally, the camera retreats from the red upholstery of the booth and glides along a long bar, returning to the central dance floor to observe performers inside a cylindrical glass structure.
